errors.sessionExpired: This list ended. Start a new one?

whatsapp.thankYouMessage: Thanks for shopping! 😊 When can I collect & pay?

fabMenu.title: Start here!
fabMenu.description: Tap here to create a new shopping session, view history, or upgrade to Pro

backNavigation.title: Edit anytime
backNavigation.description: You can go back to edit your list before starting the session

voiceSearch.title: Voice search
voiceSearch.description: Tap the mic icon to search items using your voice

quantityControls.title: Add items
quantityControls.description: Use + and - buttons to add items in 0.5kg increments

categoryFilters.title: More coming soon
categoryFilters.description: Currently only vegetables are available. More categories coming soon!

languageSwitcher.title: Switch language
languageSwitcher.description: Tap to switch between English, Gujarati, and Hindi

shoppingHistory.title: View past sessions
shoppingHistory.description: Access your previous shopping sessions and bills here

goPro.title: Unlock more features
goPro.description: Upgrade to Pro for unlimited sessions and advanced features

participantsList.title: Live participants
participantsList.description: See who's in your session in real-time!

shareButton.title: Invite friends
shareButton.description: Share this session link via WhatsApp to invite neighbors
